events.label: World War II
events.notes: Germany invades Poland / Victory in Europe

events.label: Suez Crisis
events.notes: Israel invades Sinai; UK/France intervene / UN resolution, troop withdrawal

events.label: Cuban Missile Crisis
events.notes: Kennedy briefed on Soviet missiles / Khrushchev agrees to withdraw missiles

events.label: Six-Day War
events.notes: Pre-emptive Israeli strike / Ceasefire; major territorial shifts

events.label: Vietnam War (US)
events.notes: First US combat troops land / Fall of Saigon

events.label: Yom Kippur War
events.notes: Egypt/Syria attack Israel; Oil Embargo begins / Ceasefire ends active hostilities

events.label: Iranian Revolution
events.notes: Start of major anti-Shah protests / Pahlavi dynasty falls

events.label: Iran-Iraq War
events.notes: Iraq invades Iran / UN-brokered ceasefire takes effect

events.label: Gulf War
events.notes: Iraq invades Kuwait / Coalition victory; ceasefire declared

events.label: First Chechen War
events.notes: Russian troops enter Chechnya / Khasavyurt Accord signed

events.label: Second Chechen War
events.notes: Russia begins air campaign / End of major combat

events.label: 9/11 Attacks
events.notes: World Trade Center and Pentagon attacked / No formal end date

events.label: Afghanistan War (US)
events.notes: US-led invasion begins / Final US troop withdrawal from Kabul

events.label: Iraq War (US)
events.notes: US-led invasion / Last US troops cross border to Kuwait

events.label: Russo-Georgian War
events.notes: Conflict begins in South Ossetia / EU-brokered ceasefire

events.label: Libyan Civil War
events.notes: Uprising against Gaddafi begins / Gaddafi killed; NTC declares victory

events.label: Russia-Ukraine War
events.notes: Full-scale Russian invasion / Ongoing

events.label: Israel-Hamas War
events.notes: Hamas attack on Israel / Ongoing

events.label: Israel-Iran Direct Strike
events.notes: Iran launches first-ever direct drone/missile strike on Israel / No formal end

events.label: Black Monday
events.notes: Largest single-day % drop in DJIA history / No single recovery date

events.label: Asian Financial Crisis
events.notes: Thai baht collapse / Most markets stabilised by end of 1998

events.label: LTCM / Russia Default
events.notes: Russian default / Fed-coordinated LTCM bailout complete

events.label: Dot-com Bubble
events.notes: Nasdaq peak / Nasdaq trough

events.label: Global Financial Crisis
events.notes: Lehman Brothers collapse / S&P 500 trough

events.label: EU Sovereign Debt Crisis
events.notes: S&P downgrades US; EU contagion peaks / Draghi 'whatever it takes' speech

events.label: COVID Market Crash
events.notes: S&P 500 pre-COVID peak / S&P 500 trough

events.label: SVB / Regional Bank Crisis
events.notes: SVB failure / First Republic acquired; contagion contained

events.label: 1994–1995 Cycle
events.notes: First hike / Last hike; 300bps total over 12 months

events.label: 1999–2000 Cycle
events.notes: First hike / Last hike; 175bps total

events.label: 2004–2006 Cycle
events.notes: First hike / Last hike; 425bps over 2 years

events.label: 2015–2018 Cycle
events.notes: First hike / Last hike; 225bps over 3 years

events.label: 2022–2023 Cycle
events.notes: First hike / Last hike; 525bps; fastest cycle in 40 years

events.label: 1995 Cycle
events.notes: First cut / Last cut; 75bps; mid-cycle insurance

events.label: 1998 Emergency Cuts
events.notes: First cut / Last cut; 75bps post-LTCM

events.label: 2001–2003 Cycle
events.notes: First cut / Last cut; 550bps post dot-com

events.label: 2007–2008 Cycle
events.notes: First cut / Last cut; 525bps GFC response

events.label: 2019 Cycle
events.notes: First cut / Last cut; 75bps insurance cuts

events.label: 2020 Emergency Cuts
events.notes: First emergency cut / Zero rate achieved; COVID response

events.label: 2024– Cycle
events.notes: First cut of post-COVID normalisation / Ongoing
